    Kids' Gemstone Dig is open!

    Preserve the Past, Join the Legacy

    Annual membership options for history enthusiasts, researchers, and community supporters

    • Digital Subscription

      $2525$
      Annual access to research materials and digital content published by America's Stonehenge.
      Valid for 12 months
      • Solstice: The Museum's Annual Research Journal
      • Quarterly Newsletters
      • "Real-Time" Email Updates on Research
      • Access to Digital Content

    • Individual Annual Membership

      $7575$
      Support the museum and enjoy America's Stonehenge with an annual membership! Individual membership offers benefits to one member.
      Valid for 12 months
      • Free admission to the site and museum during regular hours
      • Free or discounted tickets to special events
      • Discounts in the museum shop

    • Family of 4 Annual Membership

      $175175$
      Support the museum and enjoy America's Stonehenge with an annual membership! Family membership offers benefits up to four people.
      Valid for 12 months
      • Free admission to the site and museum during regular hours
      • Free or discounted tickets to special events
      • Discounts in the museum shop
